title: Alterative Versions
description: Providing alternative options for the Let's Camp identity allows REI to apply to additional surfaces like wood, glass, and textiles.

title: Store Posters
description: The store poster helped drive excitement during the camping season. From left to right: Hero, Camp Cooking, and Night Camping.

title: Camping Coffee Mugs
description: Morning coffee is the best coffee when camping. These promotional mugs didn't last very long.
